name: Accent Theme
description: Recolour the panel's accent (brand mark, buttons glow, aurora) with your own colours.
author: Yuno Digital

info.label: How it works
info.value: Set three hex colours below, then reload the panel.
info.description: The colours drive the --yuno-accent CSS variables the panel uses for its brand wordmark and the aurora background. Leave a field empty to keep the default.
